primitives.description: A stream of bytes
primitives.name: base64Binary

primitives.description: An integer with a value that is not negative (e.g. >= 0)
primitives.name: unsignedInt

primitives.description: A sequence of Unicode characters
primitives.name: fstring

primitives.description: Any combination of letters, numerals, "-" and ".", with a length limit of 64 characters.  (This might be an integer, an unprefixed OID, UUID or any other identifier pattern that meets these constraints.)  Ids are case-insensitive.
primitives.name: id

primitives.description: A date or partial date (e.g. just year or year + month). There is no UTC offset. The format is a union of the schema types gYear, gYearMonth and date.  Dates SHALL be valid dates.
primitives.name: date

primitives.description: A string which has at least one character and no leading or trailing whitespace and where there is no whitespace other than single spaces in the contents
primitives.name: code

primitives.description: A URI that is a literal reference
primitives.name: url

primitives.description: A date, date-time or partial date (e.g. just year or year + month).  If hours and minutes are specified, a UTC offset SHALL be populated. The format is a union of the schema types gYear, gYearMonth, date and dateTime. Seconds must be provided due to schema type constraints but may be zero-filled and may be ignored.                 Dates SHALL be valid dates.
primitives.name: dateTime

primitives.description: Value of "true" or "false"
primitives.name: boolean

primitives.description: String of characters used to identify a name or a resource
primitives.name: uri

primitives.description: A UUID, represented as a URI
primitives.name: uuid

primitives.description: A URI that is a reference to a canonical URL on a FHIR resource
primitives.name: canonical

primitives.description: An instant in time - known at least to the second
primitives.name: instant

primitives.description: A very large whole number
primitives.name: integer64

primitives.description: A rational number with implicit precision
primitives.name: decimal

primitives.description: A whole number
primitives.name: integer32

primitives.description: A string that may contain Github Flavored Markdown syntax for optional processing by a mark down presentation engine
primitives.name: markdown

primitives.description: xhtml - escaped html (see specfication)
primitives.name: xhtml

primitives.description: An integer with a value that is positive (e.g. >0)
primitives.name: positiveInt

primitives.description: A time during the day, with no date specified
primitives.name: ftime

primitives.description: An OID represented as a URI
primitives.name: oid
